text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Due to scheduled track maintenance, I planned on starting training
earlier than usual... or so I thought.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: One! Two! Three!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant... It still feels like I'm not hitting that last turn well. Once more, then...
choice_data_list: Hey, it's almost time for training though...
Hey, it's almost time for training though...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Ugh, I know, I know. Don't be so impatient. No one likes being
rushed.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Just let me focus for a bit longer. I stumbled in the middle of my last
winning concert...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Oh, you didn't see it? Well then, my recovery must've been perfect.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
But it doesn't matter if people noticed or not—a failure's a failure. I
won't allow myself to make the same mistake twice.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: That's what it means to be first-rate.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
So please, let me go through it one more time. It's fine if we push
training a bit later.
choice_data_list: Fine, but just once more, okay?
Fine, but just once more, okay?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Indeed. Once more until I'm satisfied with my performance.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Hm? Did I stutter? I don't think so.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Ohohoho! Did you really think I would leave a flaw as-is? I won't
move on until it's perfect!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I'll give you the honor of starting the music. Together, we will push my
dancing skills to the highest level!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Okay, let's start training. Are you ready?
choice_data_list: There's not much time left though...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: What do you mean? Gosh, we're fine. Relax a little bit.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Besides, I know the schedule for this course. I'm positive we've got
ample time to spare.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, that's enough talk for now! Hurry up and get ready for
practice already!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
...It's my policy to always give it my all, whether it's dancing or
training. Everything must be perfect—

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Ding dong...

text_block_list.name: School Announcer
text_block_list.text:
Training time has ended. The course will now undergo scheduled
maintenance. Students, please collect your belongings and exit
quickly.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Gasp.
choice_data_list: Did you forget about the maintenance?
Did you forget about the maintenance?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Ngh... A-as if I'd forget something so crucial! And besides, it's not like
I have to practice at school. I can go run somewhere else.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Hmph, you can leave. Training alone isn't a big deal anyway. I'll be
fine by myself!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: All right, shoo—

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
But I'm sure you have other things on your to-do list today. You don't
have to come with—
choice_data_list: As your trainer, you're my top priority.
As your trainer, you're my top priority.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
W-well, you better get ready to stay for hours and hours because I'm
going to keep running until I'm satisfied!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Ohohoho! That's the energy I'm looking for! I hope you're prepared!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As the sun slips underneath the horizon, I keep King Halo company
while she trains to her heart's content.
